title: Create: Gears n' Kinetics
body:
### Overview

***
This mod expands the existing cogwheels, & kinetic components allowing more possibilities for the Create mod by introducing new types of cogwheels, gears, and kinetic components allowing more unique kinetic interactions & aesthetic options

***
Cogwheels & Gears this mod adds of the current moment & more content will be added in the future
![Showcase](https://github.com/LopyLuna/LunaResources/blob/main/showcase.gif?raw=true)

![Showcase Hollow](https://github.com/LopyLuna/LunaResources/blob/main/showcase_hollow.gif?raw=true)

***

<details>
<summary>Content</summary>

**Ring Gear** "Supports Large & Small Cogs/Gears"  
**Tiny Cogs/Gears** "Supports only Large Cogs/Gears"  
**Shaftless Cogs/Gears** "Normal Cogs/Gears without a Shaft"  
**Hollow Cogs/Gears** "Hollowed out Cogs/Gears & Ability to have a shaft & independent rotation with it"  
**Worm Gears** "Supports Large Cogs/Gears & it functions similar to the gantry shaft & Tiny Cogs/Gears"  
**Chainable Cogwheel** "Similar to the Chain Converyor but no package system & supports different axis"  
**Cog Cranks** "Cogwheel version of the Hand Crank"  
**Creative Gear** Motor "Cogwheel version of the Creative Motor"  
  
More content is planned to be added  

</details>
